majorTuition.zh: 新加坡国立大学学费因专业差异较大：S$32,000-S$58,000/年（约$23,703-$42,962）。签Service Obligation可获学费补贴。
majorTuition.en: National University of Singapore (NUS) tuition varies: S$32,000-S$58,000/yr (~$23,703-$42,962). Tuition grant available with Service Obligation.

desc.zh: NUS是亚洲排名第一的大学，计算机科学和工程全球领先。校园面积150公顷，设施一流。与全球300+大学有交换项目。
desc.en: NUS is Asia's #1 university with globally leading CS and engineering. 150-hectare campus with world-class facilities. Exchange programs with 300+ universities globally.

requirements.IB:
各专业IB要求不同：
• Arts & Social Sciences 文学/社科：36
• Business 商学（NUS Business School）：38-40
• Computing 计算机：40-42
• Engineering 工程：37-39
• Science 理学：36-38
• Medicine 医学：43-44
• Law 法学：42-44
• Design & Environment 设计/环境：34-36

safetyDetail.zh: 新加坡是全球最安全的国家之一，犯罪率极低。校园及周边环境非常安全。
safetyDetail.en: Singapore is one of the world's safest countries with extremely low crime rates. Campus and surroundings are very safe.

climate.zh: 热带气候，全年温暖（25-33°C），多雨
climate.en: Tropical climate, warm year-round (25-33°C), frequent rain

visa.zh: Student's Pass → 毕业后可申请Long Term Visit Pass（找工作）→ Employment Pass / S Pass工作签 → PR永久居民。新加坡对高学历人才移民政策友好。
visa.en: Student's Pass → Long Term Visit Pass (job search) → Employment Pass / S Pass → PR. Singapore has friendly immigration policies for graduates.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍竞争激烈，大一不一定保证。校内约S$3,000-5,000/学期。校外HDB合租约S$800-1,200/月。
housing.en: On-campus housing is competitive, not always guaranteed for freshmen. On-campus ~S$3,000-5,000/semester. Off-campus HDB sharing ~S$800-1,200/month.

graduationRate.zh: 毕业率优秀，学术支持完善。
graduationRate.en: Excellent graduation rates with strong academic support.

employment.zh: 新加坡就业市场活跃，金融、科技、生物医药行业需求旺盛。毕业生起薪亚洲领先。
employment.en: Active job market with strong demand in finance, tech, and biomedical. Graduate starting salaries are among Asia's highest.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 强制购买学校医疗保险约S$100-200/年。新加坡医疗系统世界顶级。校内有University Health Centre。
healthcare.en: ✅ Mandatory university insurance ~S$100-200/yr. Singapore's healthcare system is world-class. On-campus University Health Centre available.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接向学校申请
📅 截止日期：2月下旬（大部分专业）
💰 申请费：S$20-50
📝 所需材料：IB/A-Level/高考成绩、IELTS/TOEFL、个人陈述、推荐信
💡 可申请MOE Tuition Grant（需签毕业后在新工作3年的Service Obligation）
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly
📅 Deadline: Late February (most programs)
💰 Fee: S$20-50
📝 Required: IB/A-Level/Gaokao, IELTS/TOEFL, personal statement, references
💡 MOE Tuition Grant available (3-year Service Obligation in SG after graduation)

majorTuition.zh: 南洋理工大学学费因专业差异较大：S$30,000-S$52,000/年（约$22,222-$38,518）。签Service Obligation可获学费补贴。
majorTuition.en: Nanyang Technological University (NTU) tuition varies: S$30,000-S$52,000/yr (~$22,222-$38,518). Tuition grant available with Service Obligation.

desc.zh: NTU是全球顶尖的年轻大学，工程和材料科学全球领先。校园被评为全球最美校园之一。南洋商学院亚洲顶尖。
desc.en: NTU is a globally top young university with world-leading engineering and materials science. Voted one of the most beautiful campuses. Nanyang Business School is top in Asia.

requirements.IB:
各专业IB要求不同：
• Arts 文学：36
• Business 商学：38-39
• Engineering 工程：37-39
• Computer Science 计算机：39-41
• Communications 传播：36-37
• Science 理学：36-37
• Medicine（LKCMedicine，与帝国理工合办）：43-44
• Art, Design & Media 艺术设计：34-36

safetyDetail.zh: 新加坡是全球最安全的国家之一，犯罪率极低。校园及周边环境非常安全。
safetyDetail.en: Singapore is one of the world's safest countries with extremely low crime rates. Campus and surroundings are very safe.

📅 截止日期：2月下旬（大部分专业）
💰 申请费：S$20-50

majorTuition.zh: 新加坡管理大学学费因专业差异较大：S$30,000-S$38,000/年（约$22,222-$28,148）。签Service Obligation可获学费补贴。
majorTuition.en: Singapore Management University (SMU) tuition varies: S$30,000-S$38,000/yr (~$22,222-$28,148). Tuition grant available with Service Obligation.

desc.zh: SMU位于市中心，以商科和社科闻名。采用小班互动教学（类似沃顿模式）。就业率和起薪在新加坡名列前茅。与华尔街企业联系紧密。
desc.en: SMU is in the city center, known for business and social sciences. Uses small-class interactive pedagogy (Wharton-style). Top employment rate and starting salary in SG.

requirements.IB:
各专业IB要求不同：
• Business Management 商学：34-36
• Accountancy 会计：34-36
• Economics 经济：34-36
• Law 法学：38-40
• Information Systems 信息系统：34-36
• Computing 计算机：36-38
• Social Sciences 社科：33-35

safetyDetail.zh: 新加坡是全球最安全的国家之一，犯罪率极低。校园及周边环境非常安全。

name.en: Singapore University of Technology and Design (SUTD)

majorTuition.zh: 新加坡科技设计大学学费因专业差异较大：S$31,700-S$31,700/年（约$23,481-$23,481）。签Service Obligation可获学费补贴。
majorTuition.en: Singapore University of Technology and Design (SUTD) tuition varies: S$31,700-S$31,700/yr (~$23,481-$23,481). Tuition grant available with Service Obligation.

desc.zh: SUTD与MIT合作创建，专注设计驱动的工程教育。课程打破传统学科界限，强调跨学科创新。小而精，就业率极高。
desc.en: SUTD was co-established with MIT, focused on design-driven engineering. Curriculum breaks traditional boundaries, emphasizing interdisciplinary innovation. Small but excellent employment.

requirements.IB:
一般要求IB 34+
• Engineering 工程/设计：IB 34-38
• Architecture 建筑：IB 34-36
• 重视数学和理科HL成绩

safetyDetail.zh: 新加坡是全球最安全的国家之一，犯罪率极低。校园及周边环境非常安全。
